patterns.remediation_strategy: Enable Dependabot auto-fix and monitor for PRs. If no PR generated within 48h, manually update parent package or use npm audit fix

patterns.description: ML/AI Python packages with security vulnerabilities
patterns.remediation_strategy: Update to latest stable versions. These packages release security patches frequently
Risk assessment required. Consider: 1) Accept risk if not exploitable in context, 2) Find alternative package, 3) Apply compensating controls
